arts.ttl: Injury worries continue for Real Madrid as another defender set to miss Sevilla clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid have nothing to play for in their final two matches of the season, but they will still be keen to pick up two wins in order to end Carlo Ancelotti’s second spell as manager on a high note.
